scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.build:packages: tsc -p packages/crypto/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck && tsc -p packages/types/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck && tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck && tsc -p packages/mcp-tools/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck
